name: jac-hacks-browser
description: Browser workflow compiler — record once, replay reliably

scripts.jac:runtime: mkdir -p generated && COLUMNS=1000 jac js electron/shell_runtime.cl.jac > generated/shell_runtime.mjs && COLUMNS=1000 jac js electron/preload_runtime.cl.jac > generated/preload_runtime.mjs && COLUMNS=1000 jac js electron/webview_preload_runtime.cl.jac > generated/webview_preload_runtime.mjs
scripts.start: npm run jac:runtime && npm run jac:build && node scripts/start-electron.js
scripts.dev: npm run jac:runtime && npm run jac:build && node scripts/start-electron.js
